ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the song */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "decade" TEXT /* Decade the artist was most active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_types" (
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart type */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "chart_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart performance entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being tracked */,
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart type */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position reached on the chart */,
  "weeks_at_peak" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the song spent at the peak position */,
  "total_weeks" INTEGER /* Total number of weeks the song spent on the chart */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales metrics for the song */,
  "streaming" REAL /* Streaming metrics for the song */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the chart performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_performance_chart_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_type_id") REFERENCES chart_types ("chart_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_performance_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the decade */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_decades" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission")
)
column_names: ID of the artist who performed the song
Indicates if the song is active or not
Genre of music the artist is associated with
Decade the artist was most active
Unique identifier for each chart type
Unique identifier for each chart performance entry
ID of the song being tracked
Peak position reached on the chart
Number of weeks the song spent at the peak position
Total number of weeks the song spent on the chart
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator)
